policy: Done means behavior verification passes, not merely that code or docs were written. VCR denominator includes tasks in active or verified state only; planned and blocked are excluded. VCR = verified / (active + verified), where verified requires state='verified', verification.status='passing', and verification.signals.exit_code=0. Do not activate a second active task. Blocked tasks are suspended records that may coexist with a different active task.

tasks.title: Bootstrap the agent harness scaffold
tasks.done_behavior: A fresh copy of this repository passes make initialize, make check, make test, and make validate using GNU make and the Python standard library only, and scripts/install_harness.py installs the harness into another repository, refusing to overwrite differing files unless --force is passed.

verification.command: python3 scripts/run_with_signals.py --task-id F000 --kind verification -- make check
verification.evidence: Runtime signal recorded for `make check`: format-check/lint/typecheck gates, all five validators (json, tasks VCR=1.000, sprints, evaluator, architecture), and 65 stdlib unittest contract tests passed, including the installer e2e pipeline. trace_id=bd44c61017dd45410095dc12106a31c4 span_id=777a1902b2eb5cc2 duration_ms=2268.
